channel.title: The Rundown AI
channel.description: Your daily AI news and insights

item.title: Anthropic tells OpenClaw users to pay up
item.description: Anthropic cuts off OpenClaw users from Claude subscriptions, escalating pricing dispute with third-party agent platforms amid fierce AI competition.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic cuts off OpenClaw users from Claude subscriptions, escalating pricing dispute with third-party agent platforms amid fierce AI competition.

item.title: AI just made the billion-dollar solo founder real
item.description: AI makes billion-dollar solo founder possible—Matthew Gallagher's AI-powered telehealth startup Medvi hits $1.8B in sales from his LA home.
item.content:encoded: AI makes billion-dollar solo founder possible—Matthew Gallagher's AI-powered telehealth startup Medvi hits $1.8B in sales from his LA home.

item.title: Dorsey makes the AI case against managers
item.description: PLUS: Build a productivity tool with Replit
item.content:encoded: PLUS: Build a productivity tool with Replit

item.title: OpenAI’s new $122B funding, 'superapp'
item.description: OpenAI closes record $122B funding round at $852B valuation, positioning itself as AI industry leader despite recent controversies and challenges.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI closes record $122B funding round at $852B valuation, positioning itself as AI industry leader despite recent controversies and challenges.

item.title: OpenAI's $1B Disney blindside
item.description: OpenAI's $1B Disney blindside: Sora shutdown shocks the AI video world. Plus, build travel itineraries with Perplexity Computer in this week's AI update.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's $1B Disney blindside: Sora shutdown shocks the AI video world. Plus, build travel itineraries with Perplexity Computer in this week's AI update.

item.title: Anthropic's secret 'Mythos' model
item.description: Anthropic's secret 'Mythos' model leaks via CMS error, revealing an advanced AI tier with cybersecurity capabilities surpassing current frontier models.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic's secret 'Mythos' model leaks via CMS error, revealing an advanced AI tier with cybersecurity capabilities surpassing current frontier models.

item.title: An exclusive Q&A with alibaba.com's Kuo Zhang
item.description: How Accio Work is turning agent teams into operators across real-world workflows.
item.content:encoded: How Accio Work is turning agent teams into operators across real-world workflows.

item.title: Meta's new open-source brain AI
item.description: Meta's open-source brain AI predicts neural activity from visual and audio stimuli, advancing neuroscience research while raising questions about AI and advertising implications.
item.content:encoded: Meta's open-source brain AI predicts neural activity from visual and audio stimuli, advancing neuroscience research while raising questions about AI and advertising implications.

item.title: ARC-AGI-3 resets frontier AI scoreboard
item.description: ARC-AGI-3 resets the AI frontier scoreboard as top models struggle with only 1% scores, revealing how far we still are from AGI breakthroughs.
item.content:encoded: ARC-AGI-3 resets the AI frontier scoreboard as top models struggle with only 1% scores, revealing how far we still are from AGI breakthroughs.

item.title: OpenAI's Sora gets the axe
item.description: OpenAI discontinues Sora video generator, shifting focus to new 'Spud' model and intensifying competition with Anthropic's Claude in enterprise AI.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI discontinues Sora video generator, shifting focus to new 'Spud' model and intensifying competition with Anthropic's Claude in enterprise AI.

item.title: Anthropic's Claude gets remote control
item.description: Anthropic's Claude gains remote control capabilities, letting you manage tasks from your phone while the AI assistant handles your Mac directly—transforming Claude into a digital employee.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic's Claude gains remote control capabilities, letting you manage tasks from your phone while the AI assistant handles your Mac directly—transforming Claude into a digital employee.

item.title: Elon Musk's 'Terafab' AI chip factory
item.description: Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip factory aims to revolutionize compute production, uniting Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI in ambitious chip fabrication innovation.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip factory aims to revolutionize compute production, uniting Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI in ambitious chip fabrication innovation.

item.title: How 81K people really feel about AI
item.description: Discover what 81K people really think about AI: Anthropic's groundbreaking survey reveals nuanced public sentiment beyond simple hope or fear, spanning 70 languages worldwide.
item.content:encoded: Discover what 81K people really think about AI: Anthropic's groundbreaking survey reveals nuanced public sentiment beyond simple hope or fear, spanning 70 languages worldwide.

item.title: Google bets on 'vibe design' with Stitch
item.description: Google's Stitch brings 'vibe design' to UI creation with voice editing and agentic capabilities, promising to revolutionize design workflows like vibe coding did for development.
item.content:encoded: Google's Stitch brings 'vibe design' to UI creation with voice editing and agentic capabilities, promising to revolutionize design workflows like vibe coding did for development.

item.title: Simo sounds alarm on OpenAI's 'side quests'
item.description: PLUS: Generate a cohesive e-commerce product shoot
item.content:encoded: PLUS: Generate a cohesive e-commerce product shoot

item.title: Nvidia's big AI day at GTC
item.description: Nvidia's GTC showcases AI breakthroughs with Nemoclaw security stack and next-gen chips. Plus: learn to use Grok for free automated research.
item.content:encoded: Nvidia's GTC showcases AI breakthroughs with Nemoclaw security stack and next-gen chips. Plus: learn to use Grok for free automated research.

item.title: Musk takes xAI into a full rebuild
item.description: Musk rebuilds xAI from the ground up as co-founders exit, signaling major restructuring amid plans for a massive public listing and talent raids from top AI startups.
item.content:encoded: Musk rebuilds xAI from the ground up as co-founders exit, signaling major restructuring amid plans for a massive public listing and talent raids from top AI startups.

item.title: Google brings Gemini to the road
item.description: Google brings Gemini to Maps for hands-free navigation. Plus: automate Gmail with Google Workspace Studio. Discover how AI transforms your daily commute.
item.content:encoded: Google brings Gemini to Maps for hands-free navigation. Plus: automate Gmail with Google Workspace Studio. Discover how AI transforms your daily commute.

item.title: Perplexity's new answer to OpenClaw
item.description: Perplexity launches AI agent system to rival OpenAI's vision, while Google Workspace Studio enables agentic workflows. Explore the latest AI breakthroughs reshaping automation and productivity tools.
item.content:encoded: Perplexity launches AI agent system to rival OpenAI's vision, while Google Workspace Studio enables agentic workflows. Explore the latest AI breakthroughs reshaping automation and productivity tools.

item.title: Yann LeCun's $1B bet against LLMs
item.description: Yann LeCun launches $1B bet against LLMs with advanced machine intelligence, claiming AI needs real-world understanding beyond language models to succeed.
item.content:encoded: Yann LeCun launches $1B bet against LLMs with advanced machine intelligence, claiming AI needs real-world understanding beyond language models to succeed.

item.title: Anthropic takes U.S. government to court
item.description: PLUS: Auto-generate video from written content with Manus
item.content:encoded: PLUS: Auto-generate video from written content with Manus

item.title: OpenAI's robotics lead exits over Pentagon deal
item.description: OpenAI's robotics lead resigns over Pentagon deal amid surveillance concerns, signaling internal backlash over controversial military AI partnership.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's robotics lead resigns over Pentagon deal amid surveillance concerns, signaling internal backlash over controversial military AI partnership.

item.title: AI will make engineering more human, not less
item.description: What changes, what breaks, and what still belongs to humans the modern age of development
item.content:encoded: What changes, what breaks, and what still belongs to humans the modern age of development

item.title: OpenAI's 'best model ever' goes live
item.description: OpenAI's new GPT-5.4 model outperforms humans on 83% of job-specific tasks, delivering breakthrough capabilities in math, coding, and reasoning. The company's best model yet.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's new GPT-5.4 model outperforms humans on 83% of job-specific tasks, delivering breakthrough capabilities in math, coding, and reasoning. The company's best model yet.

item.title: Amodei torches OpenAI in leaked memo
item.description: Dario Amodei torches OpenAI in leaked memo, calling the Pentagon deal "straight up lies" and safety theater in scathing internal message to Anthropic staff.
item.content:encoded: Dario Amodei torches OpenAI in leaked memo, calling the Pentagon deal "straight up lies" and safety theater in scathing internal message to Anthropic staff.

item.title: Altman faces the fallout from OpenAI's Pentagon deal
item.description: PLUS: Create killer thumbnails with this Midjourney technique
item.content:encoded: PLUS: Create killer thumbnails with this Midjourney technique

item.title: Supreme Court ducks AI copyright question
item.description: Supreme Court avoids landmark AI copyright ruling as artificial intelligence challenges traditional authorship laws and content creation standards.
item.content:encoded: Supreme Court avoids landmark AI copyright ruling as artificial intelligence challenges traditional authorship laws and content creation standards.

item.title: OpenAI steps into Anthropic's Pentagon void
item.description: OpenAI secures Pentagon contract after Anthropic's removal, reshaping AI's role in government and military operations amid political tensions.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI secures Pentagon contract after Anthropic's removal, reshaping AI's role in government and military operations amid political tensions.

item.title: The new top banana in AI image generation
item.description: Google's Nano Banana 2 reclaims AI image generation crown with superior quality at half the cost. Plus: create AI assistants with phone numbers.
item.content:encoded: Google's Nano Banana 2 reclaims AI image generation crown with superior quality at half the cost. Plus: create AI assistants with phone numbers.

item.title: Perplexity's 19-model AI ‘Computer’
item.description: Perplexity launches 19-model AI 'Computer' orchestrating frontier models for agentic workflows, advancing AI agents beyond the mainstream with innovative task automation.
item.content:encoded: Perplexity launches 19-model AI 'Computer' orchestrating frontier models for agentic workflows, advancing AI agents beyond the mainstream with innovative task automation.

item.title: Pentagon hits Claude with scary AI ultimatum
item.description: Pentagon pressures Anthropic to remove AI safeguards on Claude amid autonomous weapons concerns. Plus: AI video translation breakthroughs.
item.content:encoded: Pentagon pressures Anthropic to remove AI safeguards on Claude amid autonomous weapons concerns. Plus: AI video translation breakthroughs.

item.title: Anthropic calls out China's AI copycats
item.description: Anthropic exposes Chinese AI labs cloning Claude through millions of fake accounts, raising urgent industry concerns about AI model theft and competitive espionage.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic exposes Chinese AI labs cloning Claude through millions of fake accounts, raising urgent industry concerns about AI model theft and competitive espionage.

item.title: Intelligence should be owned, not rented
item.description: Inside Cisco’s strategy to scale agents securely and reshape enterprise workflows
item.content:encoded: Inside Cisco’s strategy to scale agents securely and reshape enterprise workflows

item.title: The handshake refusal heard around the AI world
item.description: PLUS: Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro doubles up on reasoning
item.content:encoded: PLUS: Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro doubles up on reasoning

item.title: Google brings AI music to the masses with Lyria 3 in Gemini
item.description: Google's Lyria 3 model transforms Gemini into a powerful AI music generator, making professional-grade music creation accessible to millions of users with unprecedented ease.
item.content:encoded: Google's Lyria 3 model transforms Gemini into a powerful AI music generator, making professional-grade music creation accessible to millions of users with unprecedented ease.

item.title: Anthropic's mid-tier Sonnet 4.6 model punches up at Opus
item.description: Anthropic's mid-tier Sonnet 4.6 model challenges industry norms, delivering near-Opus performance at a fraction of the cost, revolutionizing AI accessibility for businesses.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic's mid-tier Sonnet 4.6 model challenges industry norms, delivering near-Opus performance at a fraction of the cost, revolutionizing AI accessibility for businesses.

item.title: Anthropic-Pentagon AI feud escalates
item.description: Anthropic-Pentagon AI showdown escalates as tech ethics clash with military interests, revealing critical tensions in controlling cutting-edge AI deployment and usage.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic-Pentagon AI showdown escalates as tech ethics clash with military interests, revealing critical tensions in controlling cutting-edge AI deployment and usage.

item.title: AI's new physics discovery
item.description: AI breakthrough in particle physics: GPT-5.2 disproves longstanding theory, autonomously generates proof and reignites debate on AI's scientific thinking capabilities.
item.content:encoded: AI breakthrough in particle physics: GPT-5.2 disproves longstanding theory, autonomously generates proof and reignites debate on AI's scientific thinking capabilities.

item.title: Google's upgrade breaks reasoning barriers
item.description: Google's upgraded Deep Think AI shatters reasoning benchmarks, demonstrating unprecedented problem-solving capabilities in math, coding, and scientific research domains.
item.content:encoded: Google's upgraded Deep Think AI shatters reasoning benchmarks, demonstrating unprecedented problem-solving capabilities in math, coding, and scientific research domains.

item.title: xAI's next phase unleashed
item.description: XAI's first all-hands meeting reveals bold restructuring plans, moon-based data centers, and insights into Elon Musk's evolving AI strategy after key team departures.
item.content:encoded: XAI's first all-hands meeting reveals bold restructuring plans, moon-based data centers, and insights into Elon Musk's evolving AI strategy after key team departures.

item.title: xAI's co-founder exodus continues
item.description: xAI faces mounting leadership challenges as five co-founders exit in less than a year, sparking industry speculation about the company's internal dynamics and strategic direction.
item.content:encoded: xAI faces mounting leadership challenges as five co-founders exit in less than a year, sparking industry speculation about the company's internal dynamics and strategic direction.

item.title: ByteDance stuns the AI video world
item.description: ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 revolutionizes AI video generation, showcasing unprecedented creative capabilities that challenge global competitors and hint at a transformative Eastern innovation.
item.content:encoded: ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 revolutionizes AI video generation, showcasing unprecedented creative capabilities that challenge global competitors and hint at a transformative Eastern innovation.

item.title: AI ads steal the show at Super Bowl LX
item.description: AI takes center stage at Super Bowl LX, with tech giants and startups showcasing groundbreaking ads that highlight artificial intelligence's explosive mainstream potential and creativity.
item.content:encoded: AI takes center stage at Super Bowl LX, with tech giants and startups showcasing groundbreaking ads that highlight artificial intelligence's explosive mainstream potential and creativity.

item.title: OpenAI, Anthropic fight on the frontier
item.description: OpenAI and Anthropic battle on the AI frontier, unveiling groundbreaking advancements in agentic coding, self-improving models, and enterprise automation.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI and Anthropic battle on the AI frontier, unveiling groundbreaking advancements in agentic coding, self-improving models, and enterprise automation.

item.title: Anthropic’s ad-free campaign takes aim at OpenAI
item.description: Anthropic launches bold Super Bowl campaign challenging OpenAI's ad strategy, positioning Claude as the principled AI alternative in a high-stakes industry showdown.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic launches bold Super Bowl campaign challenging OpenAI's ad strategy, positioning Claude as the principled AI alternative in a high-stakes industry showdown.

item.title: Sam Altman’s OpenAI succession plan
item.description: Sam Altman unveils OpenAI's bold succession strategy, highlighting leadership continuity and vision while sparking industry-wide speculation about the company's future direction.
item.content:encoded: Sam Altman unveils OpenAI's bold succession strategy, highlighting leadership continuity and vision while sparking industry-wide speculation about the company's future direction.

item.title: xAI joins SpaceX in mega-merger
item.description: Elon Musk merges xAI and SpaceX into a $1.25T powerhouse, pioneering space-based compute and reshaping the future of AI infrastructure with an unprecedented strategic vision.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk merges xAI and SpaceX into a $1.25T powerhouse, pioneering space-based compute and reshaping the future of AI infrastructure with an unprecedented strategic vision.

item.title: AI agents get their own social network
item.description: AI agents create their own social network Moltbook, sparking wild interactions and raising questions about AI autonomy, communication, and unexpected digital behaviors.
item.content:encoded: AI agents create their own social network Moltbook, sparking wild interactions and raising questions about AI autonomy, communication, and unexpected digital behaviors.

item.title: Grok Imagine Tops Video Leaderboards: xAI's AI Creative Leap
item.description: xAI's Grok Imagine rockets to the top of video leaderboards, setting new standards for AI image and video generation with unmatched speed, affordability, and creative quality.
item.content:encoded: xAI's Grok Imagine rockets to the top of video leaderboards, setting new standards for AI image and video generation with unmatched speed, affordability, and creative quality.
